lastReleaseMessage: Hardening pass across api and web. Rules API rejects bad regex and inverted amount bounds, rule preview now agrees with apply (LIKE wildcards escaped), archived Plaid rows stay out of categorize and rules passes, budgets PUT enforces integer cents per D-003, analytics query params are clamped, and /api/stats collapsed to one query and now reports the archived count. Web: fully typed api client, dashboard tiles show an error with retry instead of a stuck skeleton when a fetch fails, month-switch race guard on the dashboard, date displays no longer shift a day across the UTC boundary, react-dom realigned to 18 after a bad dependabot pairing, react-router advisory cleared. Release tooling clears git locks only through the git-guard liveness check. 18 new tests.

barRaise.topFinding: Carry-forward pass. The skip-unchanged gate fired on all four conditions: zero commits since the last bar-raise (last commit dba26f3 landed 2026-07-01, before the 2026-07-02 run), the working tree carries only the same one-line DESIGN.md D-007 doc-sync the prior run already flagged, no open BLOCK, and work-queue depth 0. Lens scores and health (89) carry forward unchanged from the 2026-07-02 full pass; the twelve Tier-1 lenses were not re-fanned because nothing measurable changed. Aging still ticks: dependency-01 is now 2 runs open, security-01 3. The one live gap is unchanged drift, not breakage: the doc-sync plus the merged vite 8 / typescript 6 / plugin-react 6 majors sit unreleased, so pills still read 0.14.3 while main does not. Closing dependency-01 (commit the doc-sync, cut v0.14.4) clears it. Next full pass forces by 2026-07-09 regardless.
